_comment: Google's official published Gemma 4 12B MMLU-Pro baseline. BP082 2026-06-14.
per_domain_note: Google has not published per-domain scores for Gemma 4 12B. Aggregate 77.2% used as comparison target per yoke spec.

per_domain_31b_reference._comment: Black Sheep AI RAM-compression study of Gemma 4 31B — for reference only, NOT the 12B baseline.
